name: TASE History
description: Fetch daily historical price data for Israeli securities from TASE using the numeric TASE ID.
exampleQuery: Show me the history of TASE 1150283 from 01/01/2025 to 31/01/2025

sampleResponse.summary: TASE 1150283 daily history for January 2025 — 20 trading days.
insights: Teva opened 2025 with a steady upward trend on TASE.
